name: Auth0 Terminated Accounts Still Active
description: Detects terminated employees that still have active access in auth0.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email, e.termination_date FROM auth0_users u JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false
remediation: Disable or remove provider access for terminated employees within 24 hours and verify all active sessions are revoked.
